accurate.why: Accurately describes both amendments to the Lake Tahoe Restoration Act.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose as extending cooperative authorities and funding availability under the Lake Tahoe Restoration Act.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Accurately describes both amendments to Section 4(f) and Section 10(a) of the Lake Tahoe Restoration Act.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions in this brief reauthorization act.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes September 30, 2034, as the new availability date and October 1, 2024, as approval date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers both operative provisions of the act.

concise.why: Appropriately concise for a two-provision act.

correct_entities.why: Lake Tahoe Restoration Act and Water Resources Development Act of 2016 correctly cited.
